---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new node, metric, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and how it would work. If it involves a new workflow node,
describe what it does and where it fits in the graph.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you chose this one.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
